name: GORMAN RUPP CO
summary: The Gorman-Rupp Company, incorporated in Ohio in 1934, designs, manufactures, and globally sells pumps and pump systems. Products range from fractional horsepower units to multi-thousand horsepower systems serving water, wastewater, construction, dewatering, industrial, petroleum, fire suppression, HVAC, agriculture, and military applications. Pumps are sold through distributors, manufacturers representatives, retailers, and e-commerce in approximately 140 countries. The company operates in one business segment and reported net sales of $682.4 million in 2025.
